name: Silver Pegasus Acquisition Corp.
business: Silver Pegasus Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed to effect a merger or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has not selected any business combination target and has no current operations.

exposures.sentence: We intend to focus our search on opportunities where we believe we can capitalize on the experience and expertise of our management team to identify, acquire and potentially operate a business in the technology sector, with a focus on semiconductors and systems solutions.
